message:
Running command: echo "$(date)"
# Check the specific PID we launched
ps -p 286668 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime,comm 2>/dev/null && echo "PID 286668 alive" || echo "PID 286668 gone"
echo ""
# Find the actual librelane Python process
pgrep -a -f "librelane" 2>/dev/null | grep -v "bash\|grep\|monitor\|pgrep\|cat\|tee\|sleep" | head -5
echo ""
wc -l /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log
tail -3 /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log

function.arguments:

echo ""
wc -l /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log
tail -3 /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log", "timeout": 15}
function.name: execute_bash
